---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken link, documentation error, or something that isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: keyurp7
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the issue.

## Where Did You Find It?
- **File or page**: (e.g. `docs/architecture.md`, README, screenshot)
- **Section**: (e.g. "Architecture Diagram", "Figure 5")

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to see or happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the issue.
